subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Thou knowest and beholdest how Thy servant, the lion of the battlefield and the champion in the arena of faithfulness, hath roared with Thy remembrance and been guided by the light of guidance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب تعلم و تری عبدک اسد الوغی و لیث غیض الوفاء قد زئر بذکرک و اهتدی بنور الهدی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for spiritual recognition
